_description: Auto-generated MCP tool catalog for OpenClaw integration. Do not edit manually.

tools.name: di_run_forecast
tools.description: Run time-series demand forecast with P10/P50/P90 quantiles from historical demand data.

tools.name: di_run_plan
tools.description: Generate optimized replenishment/procurement plan using MIP solver or heuristic. Requires forecast.

tools.name: di_run_risk_analysis
tools.description: Compute supplier risk scores from PO and receipt data. Identifies high-risk materials/suppliers.

tools.name: di_run_risk_adjustments
tools.description: Transform risk scores into solver parameter adjustments (lead time extensions, dual sourcing, demand uplift).

tools.name: di_run_risk_aware_plan
tools.description: Run replenishment plan with risk mode enabled — extends lead times, increases safety stock for high-risk items.

tools.name: di_run_scenario
tools.description: Execute a what-if scenario with parameter overrides (budget, service level, demand multiplier, lead time delta).

tools.name: di_run_batch_scenarios
tools.description: Run up to 6 what-if scenarios in parallel and compare results side by side.

tools.name: di_run_negotiation
tools.description: Run full negotiation loop: generate options, CFR game theory enrichment, evaluate & rank, produce recommendation.

tools.name: di_run_bom_explosion
tools.description: Explode Bill of Materials to compute component-level demand from finished goods demand.

tools.name: di_run_cost_forecast
tools.description: Project procurement costs based on plan quantities and cost rules (margin markup, landed cost, etc.).

tools.name: di_run_revenue_forecast
tools.description: Forecast revenue and margin-at-risk from BOM plan and revenue rules.

tools.name: di_run_cost_analysis
tools.description: Analyze operational cost breakdown and detect cost anomalies from historical cost data.

tools.name: di_run_closed_loop
tools.description: Re-forecast and re-plan after actual consumption data arrives. Continuous improvement loop.

tools.name: di_run_risk_score
tools.description: Compute quantitative risk scores per material/supplier from forecast and historical data.

tools.name: di_run_supply_forecast
tools.description: Predict supplier delivery quantities, lead time distributions, and capacity constraints.

tools.name: di_run_plan_comparison
tools.description: Compare current plan against approved baseline — detect KPI drift, added/removed SKUs, quantity changes.

tools.name: di_run_ml_forecast
tools.description: Advanced ML forecast using Prophet/LightGBM/Chronos models via Python API.

tools.name: di_run_lp_solver
tools.description: Linear programming / mixed-integer solver for replenishment optimization via Python API.

tools.name: di_run_simulation
tools.description: Monte Carlo simulation of supply chain scenarios with stochastic demand and lead times.

tools.name: di_run_stockout_causal_graph
tools.description: Build a 5-Whys causal graph tracing stockout symptoms back to root causes (demand underforecast, late deliveries, stale data).

tools.name: di_run_infeasibility_causal_graph
tools.description: Build a causal graph explaining why the solver returned infeasible — conflicting constraints, capacity limits, budget too tight.

tools.name: di_get_supplier_kpi_summary
tools.description: Retrieve supplier performance metrics: on-time delivery, defect rate, price volatility, and overall score.

tools.name: di_get_supplier_rankings
tools.description: Rank suppliers by composite score (delivery, quality, cost). Identify top/bottom performers.

tools.name: di_analyze_risk_for_replan
tools.description: Evaluate whether risk scores warrant a re-plan. Identifies high/critical-risk SKUs and recommends solver parameter adjustments.

tools.name: di_run_war_room
tools.description: Multi-agent war room session: planner, risk analyst, negotiator, and approver agents analyze a plan collaboratively and produce findings/recommendations.

tools.name: di_request_plan_approval
tools.description: Submit a replenishment plan for governance approval. Creates an approval request with audit trail.

tools.name: di_run_plan_commit
tools.description: Commit an approved replenishment plan to the system of record. Creates governance audit trail.

tools.name: di_query_live_data
tools.description: Query real-time data from Supabase tables (suppliers, materials, inventory, POs). Supports filtering, sorting, pagination.

tools.name: di_list_available_tables
tools.description: Get the list of all queryable ERP/DI tables with their columns and filter options.

tools.name: di_query_sap_data
tools.description: Execute SQL queries on enterprise data. Dataset A (Olist E-Commerce): customers, orders, order_items, payments, reviews, products, sellers, geolocation, category_translation. Dataset B (DI Operations): suppliers, materials, inventory_snapshots, po_open_lines, goods_receipts. Supports full SQL SELECT with WHERE, JOIN, GROUP BY, ORDER BY, LIMIT.

sql.description: string (SQL SELECT query to execute against SAP master data tables)

tools.name: di_list_sap_tables
tools.description: Show all available SAP master data tables with their columns, row counts, and SAP transaction equivalents.

tools.name: di_forecast_from_sap
tools.description: Run demand forecast from ANY data in SAP tables via SQL. Provide a demand_sql that returns columns (material_code, plant_id, time_bucket, demand_qty) — the tool handles profiling, forecasting, and comparison. If no SQL given, defaults to Olist orders grouped by category. Works with any dataset loaded into the SQL engine.

demand_sql.description: string (optional SQL returning material_code, plant_id, time_bucket, demand_qty columns. If omitted, uses Olist default query)

actuals_sql.description: string (optional SQL for actual data to compare against forecast)

training_start.description: string (YYYY-MM start, for default SQL only, default '2017-01')

training_end.description: string (YYYY-MM end, for default SQL only, default '2017-12')

compare_actuals.description: boolean (compare with actual data, default true)

group_by.description: string ('category' or 'seller_state', for default SQL only, default 'category')

top_n.description: number (top N groups by volume, default 15)

tools.name: di_analyze_revenue
tools.description: Analyze monthly revenue trends, AOV, freight ratio, and top categories from Olist e-commerce data.

tools.name: di_analyze_rfm
tools.description: Segment customers by Recency, Frequency, and Monetary value. Identifies Champions, Loyal, Potential, At-Risk, and Lost segments.

tools.name: di_analyze_delivery
tools.description: Analyze delivery on-time rate, delay distribution, average delivery days, and performance by state.

tools.name: di_analyze_seller
tools.description: Rank sellers by revenue, orders, and review scores. Show geographic concentration and top performers.

tools.name: di_analyze_category
tools.description: Analyze product category performance: revenue distribution, Pareto analysis, growth rates, and seasonality.

tools.name: di_analyze_satisfaction
tools.description: Analyze review score distribution, delivery-satisfaction correlation, and response times.

tools.name: di_analyze_payment
tools.description: Analyze payment method distribution, credit card installment patterns, and transaction values.

tools.name: di_generate_proactive_alerts
tools.description: Generate proactive supply chain alerts: stockout risk, expedite recommendations, dual-source suggestions from risk scores.

tools.name: di_generate_daily_summary
tools.description: Generate a daily summary of digital worker activity: tasks completed, failed, cost, KPIs.

tools.name: di_fetch_external_signals
tools.description: Fetch external macro signals (GDELT geopolitical events, supply chain news, currency moves) or load demo scenarios.

tools.name: di_analyze_step_failure
tools.description: Diagnose why an agent loop step failed and suggest healing strategy (retry, simplify, model escalation, skip).

tools.name: di_run_digital_twin_simulation
tools.description: Run a supply chain digital twin simulation with configurable scenario and chaos intensity.

tools.name: di_run_digital_twin_optimization
tools.description: Optimize supply chain parameters (reorder points, safety stock) using the digital twin simulator.

tools.name: di_run_digital_twin_comparison
tools.description: Compare multiple supply chain strategies side-by-side using the digital twin simulator.

tools.name: di_run_digital_twin_reoptimization
tools.description: Analyze simulation results and derive constraint tightening for solver re-optimization.

tools.name: di_run_inventory_projection
tools.description: Project future inventory levels by material/plant using forecast demand, open POs, and current stock. Identifies stockout risks.

tools.name: di_generate_report
tools.description: Generate an HTML/XLSX report from accumulated task artifacts with optional narrative and revision log.

tools.name: di_run_sku_analysis
tools.description: Deep analysis for a single SKU: trend decomposition, seasonality, anomalies, forecast accuracy.

tools.name: di_run_backtest
tools.description: Backtest forecast models against historical data to evaluate accuracy (MAE, MAPE, RMSE).

tools.name: di_run_model_training
tools.description: Train or retrain a forecast model (Prophet/LightGBM) on new data.

tools.name: di_run_feature_importance
tools.description: Compute feature importance scores for forecast model explainability.

tools.name: di_run_drift_check
tools.description: Detect distribution drift between training data and recent actuals. Flags when model retraining is needed.

tools.name: di_run_stress_test
tools.description: Stress test the supply chain with extreme scenarios: demand spikes, supplier failures, lead time extensions.

tools.name: di_run_python_analysis
tools.description: Advanced statistical analysis with pandas/numpy/scipy. Supports Gini coefficient, Lorenz curves, correlation analysis, business-tier segmentation (pd.cut), cross-dimensional groupby, concentration metrics, and distribution analysis. Works on any loaded dataset with automatic column discovery.

tools.name: di_excel_mbr_workbook
tools.description: Generate a formatted Monthly Business Review Excel workbook (.xlsx) from prior analysis artifacts. Creates 6 sheets: Cover, KPIs, Cleaned Data, Data Issues, Analysis, Dashboard. Opens the file in Excel and uploads to storage.

open_file.description: boolean (default true — opens in Excel desktop)
